---
title: "Diffusion"
comments: false
toc: false
---

<p class="project-page-intro">
Diffusion model projects from denoising fundamentals to latent generation and
sampling efficiency.
</p>

<div class="project-stack">
  <!-- Add DDPM from Scratch GitHub repo URL here -->
  <a class="project-row-card" href="#" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <span class="project-row-title">DDPM from Scratch</span>
    <span class="project-row-meta">Forward noising, denoising objective, beta schedules, and image generation loop</span>
  </a>

  <!-- Add U-Net Denoiser GitHub repo URL here -->
  <a class="project-row-card" href="#" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <span class="project-row-title">U-Net Denoiser</span>
    <span class="project-row-meta">Residual blocks, time embeddings, attention blocks, and multi-scale feature maps</span>
  </a>

  <!-- Add Latent Diffusion GitHub repo URL here -->
  <a class="project-row-card" href="#" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <span class="project-row-title">Latent Diffusion</span>
    <span class="project-row-meta">Autoencoder latents, conditioning, classifier-free guidance, and image synthesis</span>
  </a>

  <!-- Add Fast Sampling GitHub repo URL here -->
  <a class="project-row-card" href="#" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <span class="project-row-title">Fast Sampling</span>
    <span class="project-row-meta">DDIM-style sampling, scheduler comparisons, and quality-latency tradeoffs</span>
  </a>
</div>
